rationale: The citing paper's core contribution is its own derivation of fixed-effects bias in installed-base models and its proposed IV and analytic bias-correction estimators. In the provided PDF, this specific cited paper is not given a distinct functional role in the model setup, identification strategy, hypothesis development, or interpretation of results. It appears to serve, at most, as part of general background on contagion and diffusion research rather than as a direct building block. Therefore the citation is best classified as a passing mention.
